Config Flags.Name: Descriptor Heap
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=descriptor_heap — enable the GPU descriptor heap (perf and crash fixes; opt-in, some NVIDIA caveats).

Config Flags.Name: Experimental Features
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=enable_experimental_features — enable vkd3d-proton's experimental feature set.

Config Flags.Name: Force Ray Tracing (DXR)
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=dxr — force-enable DX12 ray tracing even when considered unsafe.

Config Flags.Name: Force Static CBV
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=force_static_cbv — unsafe speed hack on NVIDIA.

Config Flags.Name: No Upload HVV
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=no_upload_hvv — block host-visible VRAM for the UPLOAD heap (resizable-BAR issues).

Config Flags.Name: No GPU Upload Heap
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=no_gpu_upload_heap — disable the D3D12 GPU upload heap (resizable-BAR issues).

Config Flags.Name: Retain PSOs
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=retain_psos — keep pipeline state objects alive instead of releasing them (workaround for games that destroy PSOs still in flight).

Config Flags.Name: Pipeline Library App Cache
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=pipeline_library_app_cache — use the application's pipeline library cache.

Config Flags.Name: Skip Application Workarounds
Config Flags.Description: VKD3D_CONFIG=skip_application_workarounds — disable per-game workarounds baked into vkd3d-proton.

Config Flags.Name: Extra VKD3D_CONFIG flags
Config Flags.Description: Additional VKD3D_CONFIG flags, comma-separated, appended to the ticked ones above (e.g. force_host_cached,breadcrumbs).

Display.Name: Present Mode
Display.Description: VKD3D_SWAPCHAIN_PRESENT_MODE — IMMEDIATE (no vsync, tearing), MAILBOX (low-latency vsync), FIFO (vsync), FIFO_RELAXED (adaptive), FIFO_LATEST_READY (vsync, always presents newest ready frame).

ENV_VARS.Name: VKD3D_CONFIG
ENV_VARS.Requires: descriptor_heap OR enable_experimental_features OR dxr OR dxr12 OR nodxr OR single_queue OR force_static_cbv OR no_upload_hvv OR no_gpu_upload_heap OR retain_psos OR pipeline_library_app_cache OR skip_application_workarounds OR raw_config
